prompt: Add a schema for partner onboarding step 1. Fields: company_name (required), website (optional), business_type (one of: law_firm, financial_advisor, insurance, other), years_in_business (optional number). No acknowledgment needed.

assertions.text: Schema is named partnerOnboardingStep1Schema (correct camelCase [feature]Schema convention)
Exported type is PartnerOnboardingStep1 using z.infer<typeof ...>
website is optional with no extra validators (no .url(), no .email())
business_type uses z.enum with all 4 correct values
No spurious import statement added (z is already imported in schemas.ts)
